title: 我每天做什么
prompt_en: Practice daily habits with action verbs like eat drink and go to school.
prompt_zh: 练习用一般动词描述日常习惯：吃、喝、去上学。
description: 掌握I eat/drink/go的肯定句和don't否定句。
knowledge_points: 一般动词 习惯 肯定句 否定句
teaching_markdown:
## 核心句型
- I eat breakfast every morning. (我每天早上吃早餐)
- I drink coffee in the morning. (我早上喝咖啡)
- I go to school every day. (我每天去上学)

## 否定句
I don't + 动词原形：I don't eat meat.
注意：don't 后面用动词原形，不加s。

title: 我的日常动作
prompt_en: Practice common daily actions like read watch play and study.
prompt_zh: 练习日常动作：看书、看电视、玩、学习。
knowledge_points: 日常动作 动词 时间表达
teaching_markdown:
## 常用动作动词
- read (读)：I read books at night.
- watch (看)：I watch TV after dinner.
- play (玩/打)：I play football on weekends.
- study (学习)：I study English every day.

## 注意
play + 球类/游戏不加 the：play football / play games

title: 我喜欢/我想要
prompt_en: Practice expressing likes wants and needs with like want and need.
prompt_zh: 练习表达喜好、想要和需求。
knowledge_points: 喜好 需求 like want need
teaching_markdown:
## 三个核心动词
- like + 名词：I like coffee.
- like + to do：I like to read.
- want + 名词：I want a new phone.
- want + to do：I want to travel.
- need + 名词：I need help.
- need + to do：I need to go.
like/want/need 后可接名词或 to do。

title: 我有什么
prompt_en: Practice talking about possession with have and has.
description: 掌握have的肯定/否定/疑问形式。
knowledge_points: 拥有 have 疑问句 否定句
teaching_markdown:
## have 的三种形式
- 肯定：I have a brother. / I have two cats.
- 否定：I don't have a car.
- 疑问：Do you have a pen? — Yes, I do.
have + 餐食 = 吃：I have breakfast at 7.

title: 我几点做...
prompt_en: Practice talking about daily schedule with time expressions.
prompt_zh: 练习用时间表达描述日程。
description: 掌握at + 时间 / in the morning等时间表达。
knowledge_points: 日程 时间 at in on 日常
teaching_markdown:
## 时间表达
- at + 具体时间：I get up at 7 o'clock.
- in + 时间段：I take a shower in the morning.
- on + 天：I play football on weekends.

## 常用动词短语
get up / go to bed / have lunch / come home / leave for
这些是固定搭配，整体记忆。

title: 去...做...
prompt_en: Practice verbs with prepositions like go to come to wait for and talk to.
prompt_zh: 练习动词+介词搭配：go to / wait for / talk to。
description: 掌握动词+介词的固定搭配用法。
knowledge_points: 动词 介词 go to look for help with
teaching_markdown:
## 动词+介词搭配
- go to + 地点：I go to work by bus.
- wait for + 人/物：I wait for the bus.
- look for + 物：I look for my keys.
- help + 人 + with + 事：I help my mom with housework.
- talk to + 人：I talk to my friend.
这些是固定搭配，整体记忆即可。

title: 购物消费
prompt_en: Practice shopping conversations: buying things asking prices and trying on clothes.
prompt_zh: 练习购物对话：买东西、问价格、试穿。
description: 掌握购物相关表达：How much? / Can I try on? / I want to buy。
knowledge_points: 购物 价格 试穿 消费
teaching_markdown:
## 购物常用
- 问价格：How much is this? — It's 50 yuan.
- 试穿：Can I try this on? — Sure.
- 想买：I want to buy a new shirt.
- 评价：This is too expensive.
- 尺码：Do you have this in a smaller size?

title: 天气与出行
prompt_en: Practice talking about weather and transportation for going out.
prompt_zh: 练习谈论天气和出行交通方式。
description: 掌握天气描述和交通方式表达：It's sunny / I take the bus。
knowledge_points: 天气 出行 交通 建议
teaching_markdown:
## 天气描述
- It's sunny today. Let's go out!
- What's the weather like? — It's warm.

## 交通方式
- I take the bus to work.
- I walk to school. It's not far.
- I go to work by bus.

title: 在外就餐
prompt_en: Practice ordering food at a restaurant and talking about dining experiences.
prompt_zh: 练习在餐厅点餐和评价食物。
description: 掌握餐厅用语：Can I have the menu? / I'd like to order / The food is delicious。
knowledge_points: 餐厅 点餐 评价 外出就餐
teaching_markdown:
## 餐厅流程
- 要菜单：Can I have the menu, please?
- 点餐：I'd like to order a pizza.
- 推荐：What do you recommend?
- 评价：The food is delicious!
- 结账：Can I have the bill, please?

title: 通讯与联络
prompt_en: Practice making phone calls sending messages and making plans to meet up.
prompt_zh: 练习打电话、发消息和约定见面。
description: 掌握通讯表达：call / send messages / Let's meet at。
knowledge_points: 通讯 电话 短信 见面
teaching_markdown:
## 通讯表达
- 打电话：I call my mom every day.
- 发消息：I send messages to my friends.
- 约定：Let's meet at the coffee shop at 3 pm.
- 迟到：Sorry, I'm late. The traffic was bad.
